title: Government policies to achieve efficient resource allocation and correct market failure
paperName: Cambridge International A Level Economics (P3 & P4)
summary: 9708 A Level — taxes, subsidies, regulation, and tradable permits with GeoGebra welfare diagrams.
learningObjectives: Evaluate taxes and subsidies for externalities.

simpleExplanation.title: Fixing market failure
simpleExplanation.summary: Pigouvian taxes align private costs with social costs. Subsidies correct positive externalities. Each tool has limitations.
steps: Tax shifts MPC up to MSC for negative externality.
Permits cap total pollution — trade creates efficiency.
Government failure: poor information, lobbying, bureaucracy.

sections.content: **Government policy** (8.1) follows **externalities** (7.4). Evaluation essays need **two policies compared** with **diagrams**.
